channel.title: Lazy Cat – dev blog
channel.description: Code by day, blog by night. Join me on my backend journey as we learn and grow together.

item.title: Adding/substracting days in Shopify's Liquid template language
item.description: How to manipulate dates (adding, subtracting, and formatting, etc) in Shopify's Liquid template language.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Shopify Hydrogen Codegen Configs
item.description: How to configure Shopify Hydrogen Codegen to automatically generate types for your GraphQL queries.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)
